subcodes.first_line: O thou whose heart overfloweth with love for the Lord! I address thee from this consecrated spot, to gladden thy bosom with mine epistle
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من طفح قلبه بمحبه الله انی اخاطبک من هذه البقعه المبارکه حتی یفرح قلبک
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @law of Huququ'llah, @thankfulness; gratitude, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
